billing.title: Billing
billing.canceledBanner: Subscription canceled. You can resubscribe anytime.

upgrade.title: Upgrade to Pro
upgrade.description: You've reached your daily AI limit. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited usage!

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By using JobPilot, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the service.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.body: JobPilot is an AI-powered resume and cover letter generation tool. We offer a Free plan (10 AI operations per day) and a Pro subscription plan (unlimited usage at $19.99 USD/month).

payment.title: 3. Subscription & Payment
payment.item1: The Pro plan is billed at $19.99 USD per month, processed securely via Stripe.
payment.item2: Subscriptions automatically renew each billing cycle unless canceled before the renewal date.
payment.item3: You may cancel at any time through the Billing page. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
payment.item4: Prices may change with 30 days' advance notice sent to your registered email.

refund.title: 4. Refund Policy
refund.body: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee. If you are unsatisfied within 7 days of subscribing, contact support@jobpilot.app for a full refund. Requests after 7 days will not be honored.

obligations.title: 5. User Obligations
obligations.body: You agree not to use the service for illegal purposes, attempt to reverse-engineer the system, share your account with others, or engage in any activity that disrupts the service. You are responsible for all activity under your account.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.body: Resumes and cover letters generated using the service are owned by you. JobPilot retains ownership of the platform, design, codebase, and branding.

disclaimer.title: 7. Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. AI-generated content may not be fully accurate or suitable for every position. JobPilot is not liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from use of the service. Job search outcomes depend on many factors outside our control.

changes.title: 8. Changes to Terms
changes.body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be communicated via email. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.body: For any questions regarding these terms, please reach us at:

overview.title: 1. Overview
overview.body: JobPilot takes your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data. By using the service, you consent to this policy.

collected.title: 2. Data We Collect
collected.item1: Account information: name and email address (Email or Google login)
collected.item2: Resume content: personal details, work history, education, and skills you enter or upload
collected.item3: Usage logs: AI operation count, login times, and feature usage
collected.item4: Payment information: processed by Stripe — we do not store full card numbers or bank details

usage.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
usage.item1: To provide and improve JobPilot services, including AI resume generation
usage.item2: To process subscription payments and manage your account
usage.item3: To send service-related notifications (billing, important updates)

stripe.title: 4. Payment Data (Stripe)
stripe.body: All payments are processed by Stripe. JobPilot does not directly store your credit card information. Stripe is PCI DSS Level 1 compliant. We only store Stripe-provided customer IDs and subscription IDs to manage your account status. For more details, see Stripe's privacy policy at stripe.com/privacy.

thirdparty.title: 5. Third-Party Services
thirdparty.item3: AWS S3: PDF and image file storage

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.body: Your account data is retained for the duration of your account. You may delete resumes and cover letters at any time. To delete your account and all associated data, contact support@jobpilot.app — we will process your request within 30 days.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact support@jobpilot.app.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.body: We use essential session cookies to maintain your login state. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or advertising cookies.

contact.title: 9. Contact Us
contact.body: For privacy-related questions, please reach us at:
